questions.question: Let f(x) = 2x − 3 and g(x) = x². Find f(g(2)).
If h(x) = 3x + 1, what is the value of x when h(x) = 16?
A function f is defined by f(x) = (x − 2)². Describe what transformation has been applied to the parent function p(x) = x².
questions.explanation: The expression (x − 2) inside the square indicates a rightward shift of 2 units compared to x².

questions.question: Let f(x) = 4x² and g(x) = x + 5. Find g(f(3)).
The function k(x) = |x − 1| − 2 is a transformation of the absolute value parent function. What is the vertex of this function?
questions.explanation: The vertex of |x − a| + b is at (a, b). Here a = 1 and b = −2, so the vertex is (1, −2).

questions.question: If f(x) = 2x − 7 and f(a) = 3, what is the value of a?
